title: Oaklands Farm Solar Park: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Oaklands Farm Solar Limited for the construction, operation, maintenance, and decommissioning of a solar photovoltaic array electricity generating station, and associated infrastructure with a total capacity exceeding 50 megawatts (MW).  Date of decision  19 June 2025  Company / location:   Oaklands Farm Solar LimitedLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  Over 50 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
